request.prompt_text:
You are extracting stage1 bundle features from a single image.
Return strict JSON only and follow the schema exactly.
Return every question_id exactly once.
Never omit a question_id and never repeat a question_id.
selected_answers must contain unique values only.
Every selected_answers value must be exactly one of the allowed_answers values.
If none is selected, selected_answers must be exactly ['none'].
Never mix none with any other signal.
Bad example: ['none', 'ridge_axis']
Good example 1: ['none']
Good example 2: ['ridge_axis', 'warm_advection']

answers.note: Low center near 43N 125E, surface trough along 44N, front and wet area in southern Manchuria
Low center near 39N 122E, surface trough and front near Liaodong Peninsula, wet area present
Front extends through mid Yellow Sea, wet area and strong wind zone indicated by shaded region and wind barbs
Front and wet area along northern Korean Peninsula, strong wind zone also detected
Front, wet area and strong wind zone also appear over southern Korean Peninsula
Surface trough and wet area seen over northern East China Sea region
High pressure center west of Japan and wet area present over western Japan region
High center over east offshore region of Japan with wet area and strong wind zone observed
